propertyImageAlt: Warm suburban home exterior with a broad driveway
summaryNote: Everything here is designed to keep the next steps clear, organized, and easy to follow.

milestones.title: Accepted Offer Date
milestones.notes: Congratulations. Our offer was accepted and the contract is now fully binding.

milestones.title: Earnest Money
milestones.notes: Earnest money needs to be submitted within 5 days of the accepted offer.

milestones.title: Proof of Funds / Application
milestones.notes: Within 7 days of acceptance we need to provide proof of funds or proof of loan application.

milestones.title: Home Inspection
milestones.notes: Inspection is scheduled and the report will guide any follow-up requests or negotiations.

milestones.title: Well
milestones.notes: Seller to provide the well inspection and water test reports for review.

milestones.title: Financing
milestones.notes: This is the financing contingency deadline. Please respond quickly to lender requests so we stay on track.

milestones.title: Appraisal
milestones.notes: This is our deadline to object to a low appraisal. Please let me know as soon as the appraisal comes in.

milestones.title: Title
milestones.notes: Title commitment should be delivered for review so we can confirm there are no issues to resolve.

milestones.title: Pre-Closing Walkthrough
milestones.notes: We will schedule the final walkthrough shortly before closing to confirm the property condition.

milestones.title: Closing Date
milestones.notes: Closing will be coordinated with the lender and title company. I will confirm time and location.

portalViews.label: Selling

portalViews.summaryNote: Everything here is designed to keep the listing, deadlines, and next steps clear as we move toward closing.

milestones.title: Listing Agreement
milestones.notes: Listing paperwork is signed and the selling plan is ready to move forward.

milestones.title: Photography / Media
milestones.notes: Photography, measurements, and listing media are coordinated before launch.

milestones.title: Listing Live
milestones.notes: The property is active and showing activity can be tracked from here.

milestones.title: Offer Review
milestones.notes: We will review offer terms, timing, contingencies, and net proceeds together.

milestones.title: Inspection Contingency
milestones.notes: Inspection-related deadlines and any buyer requests can be tracked here.

milestones.title: Appraisal
milestones.notes: The buyer lender appraisal is monitored so we can respond quickly if anything needs attention.

milestones.title: Title
milestones.notes: Title work is reviewed and any items needing seller attention are resolved.

milestones.title: Final Walkthrough
milestones.notes: Buyer walkthrough is coordinated shortly before closing.

milestones.title: Closing Date
milestones.notes: Closing will be coordinated with the title company. I will confirm time, location, and what to bring.
